data_dictionary.description: Variable-level data dictionary for MWS (micro-watershed) and village-level indicators. Static variables have a single value per MWS or village. Time-series variables are stored as objects keyed by agricultural_year (integer = start year of Jul-Jun cycle, e.g. 2017 = 2017-18). All time-series variables span the agricultural year from July 1 to June 30 of the following year.
data_dictionary.agricultural_year_convention: Year label = start year of the July 1 – June 30 cycle. E.g. agricultural_year 2017 covers July 1 2017 to June 30 2018.

variable_types.static: Single value per spatial unit, does not change across years
variable_types.time_series: Object keyed by agricultural_year integer. E.g. {2017: 450.2, 2018: 512.1, ...}
variable_types.derived: Computed from other variables; not stored raw in source Excel

mws_area_ha.description: Total geographic area of the MWS

watershed_code.description: Watershed code the MWS belongs to

stream_order_area_percent.description: Object keyed by Strahler stream order (1–11): percentage of MWS area draining into that order. E.g. {1: 35.2, 2: 28.1, ...}

downstream_uid.description: UID of the immediately downstream MWS

upstream_uids.description: List of UIDs of immediately upstream MWSes

flow_direction.description: D8 flow direction of MWS outlet: 1=NE, 2=E, 3=SE, 4=S, 5=SW, 6=W, 7=NW, 8=N

drainage_density_km_per_km2.description: Drainage line density within MWS. Documented for reference only; not ingested or used in the diagnosis pipeline.

terrain_cluster_id.description: Terrain cluster: 1=Mostly Plains, 3=Broad Plains and Slopes

terrain_area_percent.description: Object keyed by terrain class: {hill_slope, plain, ridge, slopy, valley} → percent of MWS area

aquifer_class.description: Dominant aquifer class per ACWADAM classification: alluvium | himalayan_and_sub_himalayan | volcanic | sedimentary_soft_rock | sedimentary_hard_rock | crystalline_basement

aquifer_lithology_percent.description: Object keyed by lithology name: percent of MWS area under each aquifer lithology

soge_dev_percent.description: Stage of Groundwater Extraction — block-level % development (CGWB). Thresholds: Safe <70%, Semi-critical 70–90%, Critical 90–100%, Over-exploited >100%

soge_class_name.description: CGWB groundwater development class: Safe | Semi-critical | Critical | Over-exploited

river_name.description: Name of river passing through or adjacent to MWS (null if none)

canal_name.description: Name and project of irrigation canal intersecting MWS (null if none)

restoration_area_ha.description: WRI Restoration Atlas classification (widescale, protection, mosaic). Deprecated — not ingested or used in diagnosis.

organization_domains.description: Domains of work of NGOs/organisations present in MWS (e.g. Agroforestry, Fisheries, Watershed management, Seed management). Coverage is partial.

cd_degradation_ha.description: Cumulative change 2017-18 to 2024-25: {farm_to_barren, farm_to_scrubland, total_degradation} → ha

cd_afforestation_ha.description: Total area transitioning to forest/tree cover 2017-18 to 2024-25

cd_crop_intensity_ha.description: Crop intensity transitions 2017-18 to 2024-25: {single_to_double, double_to_single, single_to_triple, double_to_triple, triple_to_double, triple_to_single} → ha

precipitation_mm.description: Annual total precipitation within MWS. Keyed by agricultural_year. E.g. {2017: 820.4, 2018: 750.1, ...}

et_mm.description: Annual actual evapotranspiration. Keyed by agricultural_year.

runoff_mm.description: Annual surface runoff. Keyed by agricultural_year.

delta_g_mm.description: Annual groundwater recharge = precipitation_mm - et_mm - runoff_mm. Positive = net recharge; negative = net depletion. Raw DeltaG column in source is buggy; always recompute.

cumulative_g_mm.description: Cumulative groundwater stock anomaly from rolling sum of delta_g_mm. Computed at runtime only; not stored at ingest.

well_depth_m.description: Mean well depth within MWS per agricultural year. CoRE Excel values are unreliable; supplied by user follow-up only.

annual_well_depth_m.description: Framework alias for well_depth_m — user-supplied time series keyed by agricultural year.

seasonal_precipitation_mm.description: Seasonal precipitation. Keyed by agricultural_year, sub-keyed by season: {kharif, rabi, zaid}. E.g. {2017: {kharif: 720, rabi: 80, zaid: 20}}

seasonal_et_mm.description: Seasonal actual evapotranspiration. Keyed by agricultural_year + season.

seasonal_runoff_mm.description: Seasonal surface runoff. Keyed by agricultural_year + season.

seasonal_delta_g_mm.description: Seasonal groundwater recharge = seasonal_precipitation - seasonal_et - seasonal_runoff. Recomputed; raw columns are buggy.

swb_area_ha.description: Surface water body area per agricultural_year, sub-keyed by season and total: {kharif, rabi, zaid, total}.

swb_count.description: Number of distinct surface water bodies intersecting the MWS
swb_count.source_column: count of SWB_UID rows per MWS UID

lulc_ha.unit: hectares per LULC class per agricultural_year
lulc_ha.description: LULC areas keyed by agricultural_year, sub-keyed by class: {barrenland, built_up, single_kharif, single_non_kharif, double_crop, triple_crop, tree_forest, shrub_scrub, k_water, kr_water, krz_water}. k_water=kharif only; kr_water=kharif+rabi; krz_water=all seasons.

cropping_intensity.description: Cropping intensity (total harvested area / net sown area) per agricultural_year.

single_crop_area_ha.description: Area under single cropping (kharif or non-kharif) per agricultural_year.

drought_weeks.description: Keyed by agricultural_year, sub-keyed by severity: {no_drought, mild, moderate, severe}. Total kharif = 18 weeks.

dry_spell_weeks.description: Number of kharif weeks under dry spell per agricultural_year. Dry spell = 4 consecutive weeks each with <50% historical rainfall (4-week moving window).

kharif_cropped_area_ha.description: Kharif cropped area per agricultural_year (converted from sq km in source).

kharif_cropped_area_percent.description: Kharif cropped area as % of MWS area per agricultural_year.

monsoon_onset_date.description: Monsoon onset date in kharif season per agricultural_year.

drought_causality.description: Per agricultural_year: {severe_moderate: {spi_score, mai_score, vci_score, cropping_area_sown_score}, mild: {...}}. Raw index values per India Drought Manual algorithm (Sections 3.2.1–3.2.2). SPI=Standard Precipitation Index; MAI=Moisture Adequacy Index; VCI=Vegetation Condition Index.

nrega_mws.description: MGNREGA works completed in MWS per agricultural_year, keyed by category: {soil_water_conservation, land_restoration, plantations, irrigation_on_farms, other_farm_works, off_farm_livelihood_assets, community_assets}.

facility_distances_km.description: Object keyed by facility: {apmc, bank, phc, school_primary, agri_market, dairy, cold_storage, agri_processing, cooperative, csc, pds, college, university}. Road distance from village to nearest mapped facility. The cooperative key is distance to an agricultural cooperative society (PACS/FSS/marketing co-op from agri_industry_co_operatives_societies) — not a water-user association, irrigation cooperative, or watershed management group.

dist_cooperative_km.description: Minimum road distance from intersecting villages to nearest agricultural cooperative society (agri_industry_co_operatives_societies in facilities_proximity). Used as a proxy for access to co-op credit, inputs, or marketing — not for water-user associations or watershed management groups.

nrega_village.description: MGNREGA works at village level per year 2005–2025, same categories as nrega_mws.

soil_type.description: Dominant soil type (e.g. Vertisol, Entisol, Inceptisol, Alfisol)

borewell_density.description: Number of borewells/dug-wells per unit area

irrigated_area_ha.description: Net irrigated area from all sources. Proxy: double_crop_area_ha + triple_crop_area_ha + single non-kharif area.

landholding_distribution.description: Distribution across marginal/small/medium/large landholding size categories

crop_type_area_ha.description: Area under specific crops (cotton, soybean, wheat, millets, pulses, etc.)

common_land_area_ha.description: Community common land / gairan / revenue wasteland area

livestock_population.description: Livestock by species (cattle, buffalo, goat, sheep, poultry)

fish_production_kg.description: Annual fish production from water bodies in MWS

ntfp_species_presence.description: Presence and abundance of key NTFP species

invasive_species_area_ha.description: Area under invasive plant species (Lantana, Prosopis, Parthenium, aquatic weeds)

forest_fire_incidents.description: Forest fire incidents within MWS per year

migrant_household_percent.description: Households with seasonal or permanent out-migration

household_income_inr.description: Mean annual household income by source

market_price_crop.description: Local market price realised for key crops vs MSP

nbss_lup_aer_code.description: NBSS & LUP Agro-Ecological Region code for the MWS. Derived from spatial intersection with data/India_AER_NBSS_LUP.geojson at ingest.

nbss_lup_aer_name.description: Canonical NBSS & LUP AER name from metadata/reference_standards.json for nbss_lup_aer_code.

mean_annual_precipitation_mm.description: Mean annual precipitation across available hydrological years.

trend_annual_precipitation_mm.description: Linear trend slope of annual precipitation.

trend_annual_et_mm.description: Linear trend slope of annual ET.

trend_annual_runoff_mm.description: Linear trend slope of annual runoff.

trend_annual_delta_g_mm.description: Linear trend slope of annual delta_g; negative trend indicates chronic depletion.

trend_cropping_intensity.description: Linear trend slope of cropping intensity.

trend_kharif_cropped_area_ha.description: Linear trend slope of kharif cropped area.

trend_double_crop_area_ha.description: Linear trend slope of double-cropped area.

drought_moderate_return_period.description: Average return period of moderate drought kharif weeks (years with moderate_weeks ≥ 1).

drought_severe_return_period.description: Average return period of severe drought kharif weeks.

mean_swb_total_area_ha.description: Mean total surface water body area.

trend_swb_total_area_ha.description: Linear trend slope of total SWB area.

mean_swb_rabi_kharif_ratio.description: Mean ratio of rabi to kharif SWB area (rabi ⊆ kharif).

trend_swb_rabi_kharif_ratio.description: Linear trend slope of rabi/kharif SWB persistence ratio.
